mapper.select: SELECT lr.id, lr.book_id AS bookId, b.book_name AS bookName, lr.apply_type AS applyType, lr.lend_days AS lendDays, lr.apply_time AS applyTime, lr.state FROM tb_lend_review lr JOIN tb_book b ON lr.book_id = b.id WHERE lr.is_delete = 0 AND lr.user_id = #{pageDTO.userId} ORDER BY lr.apply_time DESC
